data_coverage_summary: Insights Hub drives smart manufacturing through the industrial Internet of Things. Gain actionable insights with asset and operational data and improve your processes. Published API scope combines asset onboarding with telemetry, event, and file ingestion.
buyer_guidance: Use these APIs when the integration is acting as an ingestion client into Insights Hub rather than only consuming stored data out of it.
overview: Insights Hub drives smart manufacturing through the industrial Internet of Things. Gain actionable insights with asset and operational data and improve your processes. MindConnect is the primary connectivity surface for pushing asset context and telemetry into Insights Hub using REST or MQTT. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope combines asset onboarding with telemetry, event, and file ingestion.

ingest_considerations: This surface includes telemetry or event-oriented payloads that should be modeled for time-based ingestion or monitoring workflows.
The published surface includes mutation or submission capabilities, so integrations should enforce explicit governance around which upstream systems are allowed to write.
Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for MindConnect MQTT API.
